description: Rice blast fungus thrives in warm humid conditions with heavy dew
management: Use blast-resistant varieties; apply Tricyclazole 75WP at 0.6g/L

description: BPH outbreaks common in flooded paddies with high nitrogen
management: Avoid excess N fertilizer; alternate wetting-drying irrigation

description: Rhizoctonia favors warm humid canopy with dense planting
management: Maintain wider spacing; apply Hexaconazole 5EC

description: Stripe rust spores spread in cool wet conditions via wind
management: Apply Propiconazole 25EC at first symptom; use resistant varieties

description: Wheat aphids spike in dry warm weather during ear-head stage
management: Spray Dimethoate 30EC at 1.5ml/L if >10 aphids per ear

description: FAW larvae attack whorl stage maize in warm rainy conditions
management: Apply Emamectin Benzoate 5SG at 0.4g/L; early detection critical

description: Chilo partellus attacks stems during vegetative growth
management: Release Trichogramma egg parasitoids; dead-heart scouting

description: Helicoverpa armigera causes heavy yield loss in fruiting stage
management: Install pheromone traps; spray Spinosad 45SC at critical windows

description: Bemisia tabaci transmits leaf curl virus in hot dry spells
management: Yellow sticky traps; neem oil 0.3% spray; avoid excess nitrogen

description: Helicoverpa attacks flowering/podding stage chickpea and tur
management: NSKE 5% spray at 50% flowering; HaNPV bio-control

description: Fusarium wilt in chickpea favored by waterlogged soils
management: Use wilt-resistant varieties; avoid waterlogging; seed treatment with Trichoderma

description: Cercospora leaf spot in warm humid weather reduces photosynthesis
management: Spray Mancozeb 75WP at 2.5g/L at 30-35 DAS and repeat at 15-day interval

description: Soil grubs damage pods in sandy soils after monsoon onset
management: Deep summer ploughing; Chlorpyrifos 20EC soil drench before sowing

description: Obereopsis brevis girdles stems causing breakage in vegetative stage
management: Spray Thiamethoxam 25WG at 0.3g/L at 20-25 DAS

description: Whitefly-transmitted virus causes yellowing and yield loss
management: Control whitefly vector; use resistant varieties (JS 335)

description: Chilo infuscatellus kills growing points causing dead-hearts
management: Trash mulching; release Trichogramma; Chlorantraniliprole application

description: Colletotrichum falcatum enters through borers in warm wet fields
management: Use disease-free setts; hot water treatment of seed cane at 54C for 30min

description: Alternaria solani causes concentric leaf spots in warm humid weather
management: Rotate with non-solanaceous crops; spray Mancozeb 75WP at 2g/L

description: Helicoverpa armigera bores into fruits causing rot
management: Install pheromone traps at 5/acre; spray Spinosad 45SC at 0.3ml/L

description: Scirtothrips dorsalis causes leaf curl and flower drop in dry weather
management: Spray Spinosad 45SC at 0.3ml/L; yellow/blue sticky traps

description: Colletotrichum anthracnose causes dark sunken spots on ripe fruit
management: Copper oxychloride 3g/L; avoid overhead irrigation; resistant varieties

description: Pythium aphanidermatum rots rhizomes in waterlogged fields
management: Well-drained beds; Trichoderma seed treatment; Metalaxyl drench

description: Pythium myriotylum causes yellowing and rhizome decay
management: Raised beds; Bordeaux mixture 1% drench; certified disease-free seed

description: Mycosphaerella fijiensis causes necrotic streaks reducing yield
management: Remove infected leaves; spray Propiconazole 25EC at 0.1%

description: Fusarium oxysporum f.sp. cubense blocks vascular system
management: Use TR4-resistant G9 variety; avoid replanting infected fields

description: Oryctes rhinoceros bores into crown causing V-cut leaves
management: Install pheromone traps; apply Carbaryl 10% granules in leaf axils

description: Xylotrechus quadripes bores into arabica stems causing wilting
management: Trace and swab stems with Chlorpyrifos; prune infested plants in July

description: Oligonychus coffeae causes bronzing of mature leaves in dry spells
management: Spray Propargite 57EC at 2ml/L; maintain shade

description: Ustilago nuda replaces grain with black spore mass
management: Use certified seed; seed treatment with Carboxin + Thiram at 2g/kg

description: Pyricularia grisea causes diamond-shaped leaf lesions and neck rot
management: Resistant varieties (GPU-28); spray Tricyclazole 75WP at 0.6g/L

description: Tobacco streak virus transmitted by thrips causes stunting
management: Control thrips vector; rogue infected plants; avoid sowing near sunflower crops

description: Whitefly-borne MYMV causes bright yellow patches reducing pods
management: Use resistant varieties (IPM 02-3); Imidacloprid seed treatment

description: Erysiphe polygoni coats leaves with white powder in dry weather
management: Spray Wettable Sulphur 0.3% or Hexaconazole 5EC 1ml/L

description: Melanagromyza obtusa larvae feed inside pods damaging seeds
management: Spray Acephate 75SP at 1g/L at flowering; short-duration varieties

description: Phytophthora infestans devastates foliage in cool wet weather
management: Preventive Mancozeb 75WP 2g/L; curative Cymoxanil + Mancozeb at symptoms

description: Alternaria porri causes purple lesions on leaves and bulbs
management: Spray Mancozeb 75WP at 2g/L; avoid overhead irrigation

description: Whitefly-transmitted begomovirus causes severe stunting and leaf curling
management: Control whitefly with yellow sticky traps + Imidacloprid; resistant hybrids

description: Amritodus atkinsoni nymphs suck sap during flowering causing fruit drop
management: Spray Imidacloprid 17.8SL at 0.3ml/L at panicle emergence
